items.definition_en: A small decorative piece worn on the lapel of a jacket.
items.example_en: He added a silver lapel pin to his tuxedo.

items.definition_en: A decorative fastener used to close shirt cuffs.
items.example_en: He wore gold cufflinks with his dress shirt.

items.definition_en: A small decorative handkerchief in a suit pocket.
items.example_en: His blue pocket square matched his tie.

items.definition_en: A formal men's coat with a cutaway front.
items.example_en: He wore a morning coat for the wedding.

items.definition_en: A long, formal dress usually worn at balls.
items.example_en: She looked beautiful in her blue ball gown.

items.definition_en: Long gloves worn with formal evening wear.
items.example_en: She wore white opera gloves to the gala.

items.definition_en: A decorative button used in formal shirts.
items.example_en: He fastened his shirt with black shirt studs.

items.definition_en: A small, elegant bag for formal occasions.
items.example_en: She carried a silver evening bag to the dinner.

items.definition_en: A stiff, stand-up collar worn with formal shirts.
items.example_en: A wing collar is required for white tie events.

items.definition_en: A jacket with two parallel rows of buttons.
items.example_en: He chose a double-breasted jacket for the ceremony.

items.definition_en: A decorative headpiece often worn at formal events.
items.example_en: Many women wore fascinators to the wedding.

items.definition_en: A small bouquet worn on a woman’s dress or wrist.
items.example_en: She wore a pink corsage to the prom.

items.definition_en: A short, stand-up collar style on formal shirts.
items.example_en: His shirt had a smart mandarin collar.

items.definition_en: A jacket with a short, gathered strip at the waist.
items.example_en: She wore a peplum jacket over her dress.

items.definition_en: An elegant watch meant for formal occasions.
items.example_en: He put on his dress watch for the gala.

items.definition_en: A long, elegant scarf often worn with evening wear.
items.example_en: She draped a silk stole over her shoulders.

items.definition_en: A fitted dress that flares out at the bottom.
items.example_en: Her mermaid dress was perfect for the formal dinner.

items.definition_en: A tie attached with a clip instead of being tied.
items.example_en: He quickly put on his clip-on tie before leaving.

items.definition_en: A band worn to hold up stockings.
items.example_en: The bride wore a blue garter at her wedding.

items.definition_en: A pair of straps worn over the shoulders to hold up trousers.
items.example_en: Trousers braces kept his dress pants in place.
